title: Goldman Sachs Company Overview
text: The Goldman Sachs Group, Inc. is a leading global financial institution headquartered in New York. Founded in 1869, the firm provides financial services to corporations, financial institutions, governments, investors, and individuals across major financial centers worldwide. Goldman Sachs operates through three main segments: Global Banking & Markets, Asset & Wealth Management, and Platform Solutions. Global Banking & Markets includes investment banking, advisory, underwriting, financing, market-making, and trading across fixed income, currencies, commodities, equities, credit, and other products. Asset & Wealth Management provides investment management, alternatives, private wealth, and institutional asset management services. Platform Solutions includes transaction banking and other platform-based financial services. For investment analysis, Goldman Sachs is important because its earnings are tied to capital markets activity, trading volumes, M&A, underwriting, asset management fees, wealth management growth, interest rates, risk management, and broader market volatility.
